name: Bean Curd with Chinese Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the hot peppers into long strips.
2. Mix 1 teaspoon of cornstarch with 1/4 cup of water to create a slurry.
3. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat.
4. When the oil is hot, add the sliced hot peppers and fry for 30 seconds.
5. Add the sliced sweet peppers and continue frying until they are slightly softened, about 30 seconds longer.
6. Incorporate the cubed bean curd into the mixture.
7. Drizzle in the soy sauce and sprinkle the cornstarch slurry over the dish.
8. Scatter the chopped Chinese parsley evenly over the top of the beans.
9. Continue cooking for a few more minutes until the sauce thickens slightly, adjusting heat as needed to achieve the desired consistency.
